creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text: For the X11_USE=xorg=... specification, you can't split it up with whitespace.  r419907 split the line and that doesn't work.  Notice the output of 'make -v USE_XORG -V X11_USE' with the break and then edit the Makefile to have a continous comma-separated list on one line and run that make -V again.
